heading.usage: Hero titles, Section headers, Feature names. Use uppercase for maximum impact.

accent.usage: Menu items, 'Gentleman's Club' quotes, Special offers, Testimonials

utility_classes.glass_card: bg-[#121212]/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 hover:border-[#00A859]/50 transition-colors duration-300

visual_enhancers.texture: Add a subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) to the entire body to kill digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'Tracing Beam' effect on key cards (moving gradient border).

animations.scroll: Use GSAP ScrollTrigger for section reveals. Elements should slide up and fade in.
animations.hover: Images should scale (1.05) and desaturate->saturate on hover.
animations.micro: Buttons should have a magnetic feel or glow expansion on hover.

navbar.classes: w-[90%] md:w-auto px-8 py-4 rounded-full bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 flex items-center justify-between gap-8

buttons.primary: bg-[#00A859] text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-none font-bold tracking-widest hover:bg-[#008f4c] transition-all clip-path-slant
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#F5A623] text-[#F5A623] px-8 py-3 rounded-none hover:bg-[#F5A623]/10 transition-all

cards.gaming_setup: group relative overflow-hidden bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/10 p-0 aspect-[4/5] md:aspect-auto
cards.menu_item: flex flex-col gap-4 p-6 bg-zinc-900/30 border border-white/5 hover:border-white/20 transition-all

images.hero_bg: Use a high-quality dark interior shot or abstract smoke/neon texture.

media.icons: Use Lucide React (default) or Phosphor Icons (if installed) for UI elements. Use simple, thin strokes.

libraries.installation_command: yarn add gsap @gsap/react lenis framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge @phosphor-icons/react

instructions_to_main_agent: PHASE 1: Setup - Install required libraries immediately.
PHASE 2: Global Styles - Update index.css with the dark theme variables and base font settings. Add the noise texture overlay.
PHASE 3: Components - Build the 'Glass' primitives (Card, Button, Input) first. Do not use default Shadcn styles; override them with the 'Anti-AI' styles defined above.
PHASE 4: Layout - Assemble the Landing Page. Use GSAP for the scroll animations. Implement the Bento Grid for the 'Play' section.
PHASE 5: Features - Implement the 'AI Lounge' using a chat-like interface. It should feel like a terminal or a futuristic messenger.
PHASE 6: Polishing - Check contrast ratios. Ensure the Green (#00A859) is used sparingly for impact, not flooding the screen.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
